tasks.subject: Task 1: Create feature branch
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create the `feature/visual-redesign` branch so all work stays off `main` until explicit sign-off.

**Files:**
- No file changes

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Branch `feature/visual-redesign` exists and is checked out
- [ ] `git status` shows clean working tree on the new branch

**Verify:** `git branch --show-current` → `feature/visual-redesign`

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "git branch --show-current", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Branch feature/visual-redesign checked out", "git status shows clean working tree"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: CSS custom properties + dark mode infrastructure
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add the `--color-*` CSS custom property layer, dark mode overrides, and the inline theme-detection script.

**Files:**
- Modify: `style.css`
- Modify: `index.html`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] All `--color-*` variables defined on `:root` and `[data-theme="dark"]`
- [ ] `body` uses `var(--color-bg)` and `var(--color-text)`
- [ ] `section` uses `var(--color-text)`
- [ ] Inline script in `<head>` reads localStorage and prefers-color-scheme

**Verify:** Open `index.html`, run `document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-theme','dark')` in DevTools — background switches to `#111318`.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["style.css", "index.html"], "verifyCommand": "open index.html and toggle data-theme in DevTools", "acceptanceCriteria": ["All --color-* vars defined", "body uses var(--color-bg)", "Inline theme script in <head>"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Navbar — brand, link styles, dark mode toggle
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Update navbar with `~/trevordalton` brand, DM Mono lowercase links, and dark mode toggle pill.

**Files:**
- Modify: `index.html`
- Modify: `style.css`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Brand shows `~/trevordalton` in DM Mono
- [ ] Nav links lowercase in DM Mono
- [ ] Toggle switches theme and persists to localStorage
- [ ] Growing underline uses `--color-accent-light`

**Verify:** Click toggle, confirm theme switches; refresh to confirm localStorage persistence.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["index.html", "style.css"], "verifyCommand": "open index.html, click theme toggle, refresh", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Brand ~/trevordalton", "Nav links lowercase DM Mono", "Toggle persists to localStorage"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Hero section — replace parallax with terminal hero
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Remove `#name-area` parallax hero, add `$ whoami` terminal hero with blinking cursor.

**Files:**
- Modify: `index.html`
- Modify: `style.css`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] No parallax/background-image hero remains
- [ ] `$ whoami` prompt, large DM Mono name with blinking cursor
- [ ] `// Senior Data Engineer · AI/ML · LLMs` subtitle
- [ ] CTA links: Email me, ↗ LinkedIn, ↗ GitHub, ↗ Resume PDF
- [ ] Hero left-aligned with bottom border

**Verify:** Open `index.html` — terminal hero renders and cursor blinks in both modes.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["index.html", "style.css"], "verifyCommand": "open index.html and confirm terminal hero in light and dark modes", "acceptanceCriteria": ["$ whoami prompt", "Blinking cursor", "CTA links present", "Left-aligned"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Remove parallax dividers
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Delete the three `.divider-img` spacer divs and their CSS.

**Files:**

- Modify: `style.css`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] No `divider-img` elements remain in `index.html`
- [ ] No `.divider-img`, `#candy`, `#zion`, `#writing` rules in `style.css`

**Verify:** Open `index.html` — no photo dividers between sections.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["index.html", "style.css"], "verifyCommand": "open index.html and confirm no photo dividers", "acceptanceCriteria": ["No divider-img elements", "No #candy #zion #writing CSS"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: About section restyling
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Restyle about section — updated border, text link for Source Code, updated separator.

**Files:**
- Modify: `index.html`
- Modify: `style.css`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `.text-box` border is `1px solid var(--color-border)`
- [ ] Source Code is `↗ Source code` DM Mono text link
- [ ] `.title-separator` is 1px `--color-border`

**Verify:** Open `index.html` — about shows subtle border and text link.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["index.html", "style.css"], "verifyCommand": "open index.html and confirm about section restyling", "acceptanceCriteria": [".text-box 1px --color-border border", "Source Code is text link"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Terminal section headers
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace `

X

` with `# section-name` terminal headers in experience, education, projects. **Files:** - Modify: `index.html` - Modify: `style.css` **Acceptance Criteria:** - [ ] Three terminal headers added - [ ] `#` in `--color-accent`, section-name in DM Mono bold, rule in `--color-border` **Verify:** Open `index.html` — terminal headers visible at top of each content section. ```json:metadata {"files": ["index.html", "style.css"], "verifyCommand": "open index.html and confirm # section-name headers", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Three section-header blocks", "# in accent color", "DM Mono bold section-name"], "modelTier": "mechanical"} ```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Experience section — left-bordered blocks
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace Bootstrap cards in experience with left-bordered blocks, `→` arrow bullets, DM Mono labels, and tech tags.

**Files:**
- Modify: `index.html`
- Modify: `style.css`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Two `.exp-block` entries with left border `2px solid var(--color-border)`
- [ ] Arrow bullets via CSS `::before` in accent color
- [ ] Stack icon grid retained
- [ ] DM Mono tech tags below icons

**Verify:** Open `index.html` — experience blocks with arrow bullets and tags.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["index.html", "style.css"], "verifyCommand": "open index.html and confirm experience section", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Two exp-block entries", "Arrow bullets in accent", "Tech tags visible"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

**Acceptance Criteria:**

- [ ] `bagel-list` with bagel-bullet-large.png at 14×14px

```json:metadata
{"files": ["index.html", "style.css"], "verifyCommand": "open index.html, check education in light and dark", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Three exp-blocks", "Bagel at 14px", "filter: invert(1) on dark", "No .bubble-tags"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```
